metadata.description: Skills related to planning, organizing, managing resources and driving organizational outcomes
metadata.note: These skills demonstrate capability to manage processes, people, and outcomes - extracted from role responsibilities

leadership.description: Ability to guide, influence and direct teams or initiatives

planning_organization.description: Ability to structure work, set objectives and ensure execution

results_orientation.description: Ability to deliver measurable outcomes and achieve goals

analytical_judgment.description: Ability to evaluate information and make informed decisions

initiative.description: Ability to identify opportunities and take action independently

extraction_guidelines.principle: Extract from specific role responsibilities and measurable outcomes

conversion_examples.evidence_based_rewrite: Supervised team of 8; increased department efficiency by 25% through process redesign; delivered 12/12 projects on schedule
Identified inefficiency in legacy reporting system; implemented new automation tool reducing processing time by 60%

conversion_examples.raw_claim: Strategic thinker and innovative problem solver
conversion_examples.evidence_based_rewrite: Analyzed market data to identify 3 new revenue streams; developed and pitched expansion strategy to board

leadership_scale.description: When extracting leadership, specify role scope

levels.minimum_evidence: Named team member count, responsibility type

levels.description: Management of 5-15 people or multiple projects
levels.minimum_evidence: Team size, reporting structure, key achievements

levels.description: Leadership of 15+ people, department, or strategic initiative
levels.minimum_evidence: Department scope, budget responsibility, strategic outcomes
Portfolio scope, board interaction, organizational impact

proficiency_level.description: Based on scope and measurable impact
